features.title: Audio Driver Init
features.description: Initialize kernel audio subsystem during boot.

features.title: PS/2 Mouse Input
features.description: Initialize kernel PS/2 mouse input subsystem.

features.title: TTY2 Desktop
features.description: Enable desktop compositor tick/update path on TTY2.

features.title: Driver Manager
features.description: Initialize kernel ELF driver manager.

features.title: KELF Executor
features.description: Enable kernel ELF app dispatcher and kelfd task.

features.title: Auto Enter User Shell
features.description: Auto-exec /shell/shell.elf after kernel boot.

features.title: Heap Selftest
features.description: Run kmalloc/kfree selftest during kernel boot.

features.title: Load External PSF Font
features.description: Load /system/tty.psf and apply it to framebuffer TTY.

features.title: PS/2 Keyboard Input
features.description: Initialize PS/2 keyboard input subsystem.

features.title: ELFRUNNER Probe
features.description: Probe kernel ELF runtime metadata after ELFRUNNER init.

features.title: Scheduler Task: klogd
features.description: Enable periodic klogd maintenance task.

features.title: Scheduler Task: kworker
features.description: Enable periodic kernel worker service-heartbeat task.

features.title: Scheduler Task: usrd
features.description: Enable user/runtime dispatch task (shell tick, tty tick, exec tick).

features.title: Boot Video Geometry Logs
features.description: Print framebuffer width/height/pitch/bpp logs at boot.

features.title: PMM Stats Logs
features.description: Print PMM managed/free/used/dropped pages at boot.

features.title: Heap Stats Logs
features.description: Print heap total/free bytes at boot.

features.title: FS Root Children Log
features.description: Print root directory children count during FS init.

features.title: FS /SYSTEM Sanity Check
features.description: Require /system directory check during boot.

features.title: ELFRUNNER Init
features.description: Initialize ELFRUNNER framework in kernel boot path.

features.title: SYSCALL Tick Query
features.description: Query timer ticks via syscall and log result during boot.

features.title: TTY Ready Logs
features.description: Print TTY count/active/cursor ready logs.

features.title: Idle Loop Debug Log
features.description: Print debug log before entering kernel idle loop.

features.title: Virtual /proc
features.description: Enable virtual procfs paths (/proc, /proc/list, /proc/self, /proc/<pid>) in syscall FS layer.

features.title: EXEC Serial Logs
features.description: Print EXEC run/return/path logs to serial output.

features.title: UserSafeController (USC)
features.description: Prompt before dangerous user syscalls and remember per-app approval for current boot.

features.title: Intercept FS_MKDIR
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_MKDIR.

features.title: Intercept FS_WRITE
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_WRITE.

features.title: Intercept FS_APPEND
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_APPEND.

features.title: Intercept FS_REMOVE
features.description: USC prompt for syscall FS_REMOVE.

features.title: Intercept EXEC_PATH
features.description: USC prompt for syscall EXEC_PATH.

features.title: Intercept EXEC_PATHV
features.description: USC prompt for syscall EXEC_PATHV.

features.title: Intercept EXEC_PATHV_IO
features.description: USC prompt for syscall EXEC_PATHV_IO.

features.title: Intercept SPAWN_PATH
features.description: USC prompt for syscall SPAWN_PATH.

features.title: Intercept SPAWN_PATHV
features.description: USC prompt for syscall SPAWN_PATHV.

features.title: Intercept PROC_KILL
features.description: USC prompt for syscall PROC_KILL.

features.title: Intercept SHUTDOWN
features.description: USC prompt for syscall SHUTDOWN.

features.title: Intercept RESTART
features.description: USC prompt for syscall RESTART.

features.title: Keyboard TTY Switch Hotkey
features.description: Enable ALT+F1..F4 keyboard hotkey for active TTY switching.

features.title: Keyboard Ctrl Shortcuts
features.description: Enable Ctrl+A/C/V shortcuts for input selection/copy/paste.

features.title: Keyboard Force-Stop Hotkey
features.description: Enable Ctrl+Alt+C force-stop for current running user process.

features.title: User Init Script Probe
features.description: Probe and log /shell/init.cmd presence during userland init.

features.title: User System App Probe
features.description: Probe /system/elfrunner.elf and /system/memc.elf during userland init.

features.title: Scheduler Task Count Log
features.description: Print scheduler task count after scheduler initialization.

features.title: Interrupt Ready Log
features.description: Print IDT/PIC initialized log after interrupt setup.

features.title: Shell Mode Log
features.description: Print whether boot default mode is user shell or kernel shell.
